productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Checks Blue Shirts
description: Composition Blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, with full arms and buttoned cuffs, tipped collar, grey inner lining for the cuffs and collar, front buttoned placket and pocket on left chest with embroidered Big Ben logo Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get casual, get comfortable in style with this shirt from united colors of benetton. The full sleeves are sure to keep the chill away this winter, while you can roll up the sleeves to suit the occasion. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
